test-case.name: ShortSession_CompletesAndWritesTrialLog
test-case.output: [ProgramScheduler] Reset for new phase: CongruentPair_WakeForest, 30 sessions. [ProgramScheduler] Loaded state: 0/30 (CongruentPair_WakeForest), last session 0001-01-01 00:00. [RewardController] Initialized in OpenLoop mode. Tasks must call TriggerReward() directly on detection. [AVTraining] No baselineResults assigned. Eccentricity progression will use defaults; contrast will start at a generic level. Run contrast sensitivity test first for personalization. [AudioVisualTraining_ParadigmB] === READY PHASE === Adjust headset/controllers, then press the response button to begin countdown. [AudioVisualTraining_ParadigmB] Ready complete. Starting baseline. [AudioVisualTraining_ParadigmB] === BASELINE PHASE === Sit comfortably, relax, and look around naturally. Duration: 0.05 seconds (0.0 minutes) [DataLogger] ✓ Logging started: /Users/ericlespagnon/Dropbox/DEV-LOCAL/NegletFix/Unity/NeglectFix/Logs/session_2026-06-02_09-01-44.csv [DataLogger] Event logged: session_start [DataLogger] Event logged: baseline_start_AudioVisualTraining_ParadigmB [DataLogger] Event logged: baseline_end [AudioVisualTraining_ParadigmB] Baseline complete! [AudioVisualTraining_ParadigmB] === TRAINING PHASE === Neurofeedback is now active. Focus on looking left! Duration: 2 seconds (0.0 minutes) [DataLogger] Event logged: training_start_AudioVisualTraining_ParadigmB [ProgramScheduler] Session 1 of 30 started (CongruentPair_WakeForest). [DataLogger] Event logged: block_1_start [AVTraining] === BLOCK 1/1 === [DataLogger] Trial logging opened: /Users/ericlespagnon/Library/Application Support/DefaultCompany/NegletFix/training_trials/av_training_2026-06-02_09-01-44.csv [DataLogger] Event logged: reward_triggered [RewardController] ✨ REWARD #1 triggered! [DataLogger] Event logged: training_end [DataLogger] Trial log closed: /Users/ericlespagnon/Library/Application Support/DefaultCompany/NegletFix/training_trials/av_training_2026-06-02_09-01-44.csv (2 trials). [ProgramScheduler] Session 1 of 30 complete. Next session due: 2026-06-03 13:01. [AVTraining] Session complete. 2 recorded trials (1 rehab, 1 controls). Rehab: 1/1 (100 %). Controls: 0/1 (0 %). Final staircase: 0.00 LogCS. [AudioVisualTraining_ParadigmB] Training complete! [AudioVisualTraining_ParadigmB] === COOL-DOWN PHASE === Relax and let your brain consolidate what you learned. Duration: 0.05 seconds (0.0 minutes) [DataLogger] Event logged: cooldown_start_AudioVisualTraining_ParadigmB [DataLogger] Event logged: cooldown_end [AudioVisualTraining_ParadigmB] Cool-down complete! [DataLogger] Event logged: session_end [DataLogger] Logging stopped. 20 samples logged to: /Users/ericlespagnon/Dropbox/DEV-LOCAL/NegletFix/Unity/NeglectFix/Logs/session_2026-06-02_09-01-44.csv === SESSION SUMMARY === Task: AudioVisualTraining_ParadigmB (Level 1) Total duration: 0.0 minutes Total rewards: 1 Data logged to: /Users/ericlespagnon/Dropbox/DEV-LOCAL/NegletFix/Unity/NeglectFix/Logs/session_2026-06-02_09-01-44.csv ======================= [AudioVisualTraining_ParadigmB] Session completed! Total time: 0.0 minutes
